---
title: "All Battlecards"
---

# REFLEX Battlecards

Attack scenarios and defense strategies organized by the REFLEX framework.

## Supply Chain & Dependencies

- [Dependency Confusion Attacks](battlecards/dependency-confusion-attacks.qmd)
- [NPM Supply Chain Attack](battlecards/npm-supply-chain-attack.qmd)
- [Abandoned Package Hijack](battlecards/abandoned-package-hijack.qmd)
- [Registry Namespace Collisions](battlecards/registry-namespace-collisions.qmd)
- [Lockfile and SemVer Range Abuse](battlecards/lockfile-and-semver-range-abuse.qmd)

## Python Ecosystem

- [Python and pip Supply Chain Issues (1)](battlecards/python-and-pip-supply-chain-issues-1.qmd)
- [Python and pip Supply Chain Issues (2)](battlecards/python-and-pip-supply-chain-issues-2.qmd)
- [Python and pip Supply Chain Issues (3)](battlecards/python-and-pip-supply-chain-issues-3.qmd)
- [Python and pip Supply Chain Issues (4)](battlecards/python-and-pip-supply-chain-issues-4.qmd)

## Java Ecosystem

- [Java and Maven Gradle Dependency Risks (1)](battlecards/java-and-maven-gradle-dependency-risks-1.qmd)
- [Java and Maven Gradle Dependency Risks (2)](battlecards/java-and-maven-gradle-dependency-risks-2.qmd)
- [Java and Maven Gradle Dependency Risks (3)](battlecards/java-and-maven-gradle-dependency-risks-3.qmd)
- [Java and Maven Gradle Dependency Risks (4)](battlecards/java-and-maven-gradle-dependency-risks-4.qmd)

## JavaScript & Node.js

- [Node.js and npm Dependency Sprawl](battlecards/node.js-and-npm-dependency-sprawl.qmd)
- [npm Worm Shai-Hulud](battlecards/npm-worm_shai-hulud.qmd)

## Other Languages

- [Go Modules Dependency Risks](battlecards/go-modules-dependency-risks.qmd)
- [Rust Crates Supply Chain](battlecards/rust-crates-supply-chain.qmd)

## AI/ML Security

- [AI Cost Amplification Attacks](battlecards/ai-cost-amplification-attacks.qmd)
- [AI Dependency Typosquatting](battlecards/ai-dependency-typosquatting.qmd)
- [AI Service Abuse (1)](battlecards/ai-service-abuse-1.qmd)
- [AI Service Abuse (2)](battlecards/ai-service-abuse-2.qmd)
- [AI in CI CD Pipelines](battlecards/ai-in-ci-cd-pipelines.qmd)
- [Adversarial Input Attacks](battlecards/adversarial-input-attacks.qmd)
- [Data Poisoning Attacks (1)](battlecards/data-poisoning-attacks-1.qmd)
- [Data Poisoning Attacks (2)](battlecards/data-poisoning-attacks-2.qmd)
- [Data Poisoning Attacks (3)](battlecards/data-poisoning-attacks-3.qmd)
- [Dataset Supply Chain Attacks](battlecards/dataset-supply-chain-attacks.qmd)
- [LLM Tooling Misuse](battlecards/llm-tooling-misuse.qmd)
- [Model Exfiltration and Theft](battlecards/model-exfiltration-and-theft.qmd)
- [Model Provenance and Evaluation Bypass](battlecards/model-provenance-and-evaluation-bypass.qmd)
- [Model Supply Chain Metadata Leaks](battlecards/model-supply-chain-metadata-leaks.qmd)
- [Poisoned AI ML Models](battlecards/poisoned-ai-ml-models.qmd)
- [Prompt Injection in AI Systems](battlecards/prompt-injection-in-ai-systems.qmd)

## CI/CD Security

- [Branch Protection and Codeowner Gaps](battlecards/branch-protection-and-codeowner-gaps.qmd)
- [Build Cache and Artifact Poisoning](battlecards/build-cache-and-artifact-poisoning.qmd)
- [CircleCI and Travis Token Theft](battlecards/circleci-and-travis-token-theft.qmd)
- [Cloud Metadata and SSRF in Builds](battlecards/cloud-metadata-and-ssrf-in-builds.qmd)
- [Dev Container Post-Create Hooks](battlecards/dev-container-post-create-hooks.qmd)
- [Docker Socket and Privileged Builds](battlecards/docker-socket-and-privileged-builds.qmd)
- [GitHub Actions Workflow Poisoning](battlecards/github-actions-workflow-poisoning.qmd)
- [GitHub OIDC Misconfiguration](battlecards/github-oidc-misconfiguration.qmd)
- [GitLab CI Runner Attacks](battlecards/gitlab-ci-runner-attacks.qmd)
- [Jenkins CI CD Compromise](battlecards/jenkins-ci-cd-compromise.qmd)

## Developer Environment

- [Advanced Envvar Abuse](battlecards/advanced-envvar-abuse.qmd)
- [Browser-Based Dev Tool Exposure](battlecards/browser-based-dev-tool-exposure.qmd)
- [Developer Review Fatigue and Social Engineering](battlecards/developer-review-fatigue-and-social-engineering.qmd)
- [Environment Variable Poisoning](battlecards/environment-variable-poisoning.qmd)
- [Exposed Secrets in Code and Config](battlecards/exposed-secrets-in-code-and-config.qmd)
- [IDE Telemetry and Extension Exfiltration](battlecards/ide-telemetry-and-extension-exfiltration.qmd)
- [Malicious IDE Plugins](battlecards/malicious-ide-plugins.qmd)
- [SSH Agent and TOFU Weaknesses](battlecards/ssh-agent-and-tofu-weaknesses.qmd)

## Infrastructure & Deployment

- [Archive and Installer Tricks](battlecards/archive-and-installer-tricks.qmd)
- [CDN and Mirror Substitution](battlecards/cdn-and-mirror-substitution.qmd)
- [curl | bash Installer Attacks](battlecards/curl-|-bash-installer-attacks.qmd)
- [DNS Attacks](battlecards/dns.qmd)
- [Kubernetes Misconfigurations](battlecards/kubernetes-misconfigurations.qmd)
- [Packer Build Script Risks](battlecards/packer-build-script-risks.qmd)
- [Terraform Module Attacks](battlecards/terraform-module-attacks.qmd)

## Social Engineering & Human Factors

- [Homoglyph and Trojan Source Attacks](battlecards/homoglyph-and-trojan-source-attacks.qmd)
- [License and Policy Bombs](battlecards/license-and-policy-bombs.qmd)
- [Maintainer Account Takeover](battlecards/maintainer-account-takeover.qmd)
- [Phishing Developers](battlecards/phis.qmd)

## Supply Chain Integrity

- [Provenance and SBOM Tampering](battlecards/provenance-and-sbom-tampering.qmd)
- [Submodule and Vendored Code Drift](battlecards/submodule-and-vendored-code-drift.qmd)

---

**Total: 64 Battlecards** | Each battlecard follows the REFLEX framework: **R**econnaissance, **E**valuation, **F**ortify, **L**imit, E**x**pose, E**x**ercise
